headline_finding: 60-70% of 7-day MVP already exists — do not build from scratch
phase_boundary: 7-day MVP only: Conversation → Extract → Approval → Commitment → Today/Overdue. No calendar, Sherry share, waiting-on buckets, coaching, or CC rebuild in this blueprint.
founder_decisions: C2 is long-term destination surface; v1 reuses Mirror/Today with C2 embed path
Private by default for all users; explicit share only
Evidence First Law mandatory on every extraction
BPB blueprints 7-day MVP slice only — not 30-day feature set
No builder execute until operator billing aligned to founder debit card
resolved_questions: Daily surface? C2 destination; Mirror/Today for v1 delivery
Sherry default? Private until explicit share (all users)
Build from scratch? No — salvage + wire + consolidate routes
Who authors BLUEPRINT? BPB from BPB_HANDOFF_SPEC.md
Execute now? No — operator billing gate

operator_execution_gates.note: Align API provider billing to founder debit card before factory execute-step or Railway builder
